title: サイコーのアタシたち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket has left her mark on the Twinkle
Series, achieving results to be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm reflecting on everything we've
achieved on the way to this major turning point...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Traaaineeer! Can you hide me somewhere? Just
for a little?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm playing hide-and-seek with Taishin and Hayahide, but I absolutely, positively can't lose this round!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is! Always give your best shot at
everything, no matter how big or small! That's
how BNW does things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They may have been competitive when it comes
to training and races, but I don't recall them
making a big deal out of little things like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I ask for details from Ticket, and she puffs up
with pride as she explains away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few minutes earlier...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide! Taishin! I challenge you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We're rivals, after all! We gotta have a super
competitive spirit at all times!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, what's gotten into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's probably some influence from a manga she
happened to read.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Competing fiercely... pushing each other to reach
new heights... And before we know it, we'll have
forged unbreakable bonds of friendship!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's why we gotta motivate each other to be at
our best—constantly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how the three of them ended up
playing hide-and-seek. Narita Taishin, who lost at
rock-paper-scissors, is on the hunt for the other
two.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
She found Hayahide already—I'm the only one
left! So I gotta try twice as hard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, just hide me from Taishin, Trainer!
PLEASE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Winning Ticket dives underneath my desk, and
mere moments later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket? You in here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Meh, whatever. Let me take a break here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a quick glance around the office, Narita
Taishin casually picks up a notebook from the
desk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's Winning Ticket's race agenda from last year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Last year's agenda, huh? The Osaka Hai, the
Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's when Ticket wasn't doing so well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Biwa Hayahide whispers, Narita Taishin lowers
her voice as well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, back then I thought she would've
been better off just quitting—especially around
the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, she got out of her funk, so it's fine now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I knew you were worried about her, in your
own way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? Like you weren't? I remember you going
on about how you missed our "exhilarating
showdowns."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's true. Racing you both is the best form of
training I can wish for.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, don't you feel even a little embarrassed saying this stuff?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching the two of them talk so fondly, my
heart warms with the memories of their heated
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There were times they were distant or clashed,
but both of them watched over Winning Ticket
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, forget it. It's not like I ever tried to take
things into my own hands the way Hayahide did.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I also was simply worried, nothing more.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The reason why Ticket recovered was because
she's always had the adaptability and strength to
do so.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaaah! You guuuuys!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you, thank you, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm sooo glad I came to the academy and met you twooo! Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I knew you were here.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank y—huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My strategy worked. I win, and our game of
hide-and-seek is over.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? You WIN?! Wait, no... WHY?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... She's as awkward at expressing her
feelings as ever. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I should be going too. I need to return a
book I borrowed.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: They're gone...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Heh heh heh heh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, I'm just... so happy about all that stuff
they said! Even if I didn't really get half of it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And you know, if it weren't for them, I don't think
I'd ever have been able to run such amazing races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm really happy I came to Tracen Academy and
met those two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over our past three years together, Winning
Ticket's friends have played a huge role in giving
her the inspiration she needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they'll continue to stick by Winning
Ticket's side, providing a positive influence on
her for years to come.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I can't forget to say this! I also met the
best trainer I could've asked for!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Let's keep going for it together—okay,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On this calm afternoon, it feels like my days of
working together with Winning Ticket are
beginning anew.
